title: phlegmariurus capellae
intro: Phlegmariurus capellae, also known as the Capella walking fern, is a species of epiphytic plant in the family Lycopodiaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Phlegmariurus capellae include its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in traditional medicine to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Traditional herbal preparations of Phlegmariurus capellae include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
